overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City at dusk. The player moves from a purple-lit underpass along a waterfront promenade and through neon-lit commercial districts with futuristic architecture and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass with street vendor

events.description: passing by a street food stall with neon lighting
futuristic vehicle passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath a purple-lit overpass

notable_agents.action: female vendor standing at food stall
futuristic car driving past on the road

entered.detail: large concrete overpass with purple neon strip lighting underneath
blue cylindrical food cart with yellow neon menu display
metal barrier separating sidewalk from road
tall cyberpunk buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete overpass illuminated by purple neon strips. A street food vendor stands by a blue cylindrical cart on the right while vehicles pass on the road beyond the guard rail. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with futuristic architecture visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with shopfronts and digital signage

events.description: exiting the covered overpass into open street with visible sky
approaching and passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk passing by commercial storefronts and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking toward camera
pedestrian in blue outfit walking away from camera

entered.detail: row of stores with teal and orange facades and digital signs
futuristic lamp posts along the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered overpass into open air as dusk settles. The sidewalk runs alongside commercial storefronts with glowing digital signage. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions while the camera continues forward, passing a pedestrian in a brown jacket.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade along canal with city views

events.description: turning left to reveal waterfront canal and distant skyline
sunset light fading as dusk settles over the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path with the canal on the left and city skyline ahead

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking along the waterfront path

entered.detail: calm waterway reflecting the city lights
retaining wall with red neon vertical lights
trees with reddish foliage along the path
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows across the water

segments.scene_description: The path opens to reveal a waterfront canal with the city skyline reflected in the water. Red-leafed trees line the promenade as the camera walks along the embankment. The lighting shifts to natural dusk as the purple neon gives way to the evening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with holographic advertisements and phone terminals

events.description: turning back toward the main street with heavy neon signage
entering area with row of phone booths and digital terminals

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit commercial district passing holographic ads and public terminals

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking along the storefronts

entered.detail: large floating advertisements with pink and purple neon
row of teal and gray public communication booths with screens
futuristic bridge or monorail track with purple lighting
large cylindrical building with wraparound display

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the water back into the dense commercial district. The street is lined with holographic billboards glowing in pink and purple. A row of futuristic phone booths lines the right side while elevated transit structures crisscross above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with food vendors and city views

events.description: lighting shifts to green neon as entering covered walkway section
approaching food cart vendor on the left
crossing bridge with panoramic view of downtown skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated promenade toward a food vendor with the city skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at yellow and green food cart
pedestrian in green jacket walking ahead

entered.detail: overhead structure with green fluorescent lighting
yellow and green mobile food vendor stall with umbrella
white benches with glowing cyan light strips

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues under a green-lit overpass with neon benches lining the right side. A food cart with a yellow and green umbrella appears on the left. The camera approaches the vendor while the downtown skyline looms ahead, creating a panoramic view of the illuminated skyscrapers against the darkening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit underpass through a bustling commercial district and along a waterfront promenade. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass illuminated by purple neon strips, passing a street food vendor and flowing traffic before emerging into the open air of a sidewalk lined with glowing digital signage and pedestrians. As the camera continues forward, the scene opens up to a waterfront canal where red-leafed trees line the embankment and the purple artificial light shifts toward the natural tones of a darkening dusk sky. The path then turns away from the water and back into a dense commercial hub filled with pink and purple holographic billboards and elevated transit structures. Finally, the movement leads under a green-lit overpass past neon benches and a colorful food cart, ending with a panoramic view of the illuminated downtown skyscrapers looming against the night.
